hero.name: Advocate Sourabh Rawat
hero.desc: Dedicated legal representation with 10+ years of practice across criminal, civil, and family courts in Lucknow.

whyChoose.label: Why Choose Us
whyChoose.title: The
whyChoose.subtitle: What sets Advocate Sourabh Rawat apart from the crowd.
whyChoose.r1Desc: No assistants, no middlemen. You speak directly with Advocate Sourabh about your case from the very first call.
whyChoose.r2Desc: Every query is responded to within 2 hours. For urgent criminal matters, immediate phone consultation is available.
whyChoose.r3Desc: Complete fee structure is explained before you commit. No hidden charges, no surprise bills — what you're told is what you pay.
whyChoose.r4Desc: Over a decade and a half of practice across criminal, civil, and family courts — District Court through High Court Lucknow.
whyChoose.r5Desc: Every consultation and case detail is treated as strictly privileged. Your personal and legal matters stay protected.
whyChoose.r6Desc: Physically present across Lucknow courts and police stations. In-person meetings at the chamber for detailed case discussion.

practiceAreas.label: Legal Services
practiceAreas.title: Practice
practiceAreas.desc: Comprehensive legal representation across all major practice areas — District Courts and High Court Lucknow Bench.
practiceAreas.ctaTitle: Have a legal matter to discuss?
practiceAreas.ctaSub: Reach out directly — response within 2 hours.

criminal.title: Criminal Law
criminal.desc: All criminal defense matters across Lucknow.

cards.title: Bail Applications
cards.desc: Representation in bail hearings at Magistrate and Sessions Court. Quick filing and urgent hearings arranged.

cards.title: Anticipatory Bail
cards.desc: Pre-arrest bail protection under Section 438 CrPC. Filed immediately when arrest is apprehended.

cards.title: FIR Defense & Quashing
cards.desc: Legal defense against false FIRs. High Court petitions for quashing of FIR under Section 482 CrPC.

cards.title: Sessions Court Trial
cards.desc: Full trial representation in criminal cases — charge framing, witness examination, arguments and final hearing.

civil.title: Civil Law
civil.desc: Dispute resolution and property matters in lower courts and HC.

cards.title: Property Disputes
cards.desc: Ownership, possession, partition, and boundary disputes. Civil suits filed in District Court Lucknow.

cards.title: Civil Injunctions
cards.desc: Temporary and permanent injunction applications to stop illegal construction, dispossession, or encroachment.

cards.title: Recovery Suits
cards.desc: Recovery of money, loans, and dues through civil court. Summary suits and execution proceedings handled.

cards.title: High Court Civil Writs
cards.desc: Writ petitions at Allahabad High Court Lucknow Bench for civil rights, government disputes, and service matters.

family.title: Family Law
family.desc: Divorce, child custody, and family disputes in Family Court.

cards.title: Divorce Proceedings
cards.desc: Both mutual consent and contested divorce handled in Family Court Lucknow. Complete documentation and representation.

cards.title: Child Custody
cards.desc: Guardianship and custody cases under Hindu Minority Act and Guardians & Wards Act. Child's best interest priority.

cards.title: Maintenance Claims
cards.desc: Maintenance applications under Section 125 CrPC and Hindu Marriage Act. Interim and final maintenance secured.

cards.title: Domestic Violence (DV Act)
cards.desc: Protection orders, residence orders, and compensation under Protection of Women from Domestic Violence Act 2005.

police.title: Police Station Matters
police.desc: On-ground legal support at police stations across Lucknow.

cards.title: Arrest & Detention Rights
cards.desc: Legal representation immediately upon arrest. Ensuring rights under Article 22 — no illegal detention beyond 24 hours.

cards.title: FIR Registration Help
cards.desc: Assisting complainants in getting FIR registered at police station. Escalation to Magistrate if police refuses registration.

cards.title: Questioning & Statement
cards.desc: Legal presence during police questioning and statement recording. Preventing coerced or incorrect statements.

cards.title: 24×7 Emergency Help
cards.desc: Available for urgent police station matters across Lucknow. WhatsApp for immediate response any time.

faq.q1: FIR ho jaaye toh kya karna chahiye?
faq.a1: Turant ek criminal lawyer se milein...

process.feeIntro: Schedule a consultation at either chamber location or via WhatsApp.

criminal-law.title: Criminal Law Defense
criminal-law.desc: Immediate legal representation for FIR, bail, anticipatory bail, and sessions court matters.
criminal-law.content: Advocate Sourabh Rawat provides aggressive and strategic defense in all criminal matters. Whether you are facing false accusations or require urgent bail, our chambers ensure that your constitutional rights are protected at every stage of the legal process.

civil-law.title: Civil Law & Property Disputes
civil-law.desc: Protecting your property and civil rights through expert representation.
civil-law.content: Civil litigation requires patience, meticulous documentation, and strategic foresight. We handle complex property disputes, injunctions, and recovery suits across District Courts and the High Court, ensuring your assets and rights are secured.
services: Recovery Suits and Cheque Bounce (138 NI Act)
Breach of Contract and Commercial Disputes
Civil Writ Petitions in High Court

family-law.title: Family Law & Matrimonial Disputes
family-law.desc: Sensitive and confidential resolutions for family matters.
family-law.content: Family disputes are emotionally draining. We aim to resolve matrimonial conflicts through mediation and strategic litigation, always prioritizing confidentiality, child welfare, and fair settlements.

police-station.title: Police Station Matters
police-station.desc: On-site legal support during questioning and FIR filing.
police-station.content: The crucial moments during a police inquiry can determine the trajectory of your case. Advocate Sourabh Rawat provides immediate, on-site legal counsel to prevent unlawful detention and ensure proper statement recording.

team.label: Our Experts
team.title: Legal
team.subtitle: Experienced advocates dedicated to securing your rights and delivering results.
team.sourabhDesc: With over 10 years of practice at the High Court and District Courts, Adv. Sourabh Rawat leads the chambers with expertise in criminal defense and civil litigation.
team.assoc1Desc: Expertise in handling complex family law disputes and civil matters with a strategic and compassionate approach.
team.assoc2Desc: Specializes in comprehensive property registration, title verification, and expert legal documentation services.
team.assoc3Desc: Focuses on corporate law, bail matters, and providing immediate legal assistance for FIR and police station matters.

about.meta_title: About — Adv. Sourabh Rawat | Advocate High Court Lucknow
about.meta_description: Advocate Sourabh Rawat, enrolled with Bar Council of Uttar Pradesh, practises criminal, civil, and family law at District Court and High Court Lucknow.
about.name: Adv. Sourabh Rawat
about.enrollment: Enrolled — Bar Council of Uttar Pradesh
about.bio_1: Advocate Sourabh Rawat is enrolled with the Bar Council of Uttar Pradesh and practises across District Court Lucknow and the High Court of Judicature at Allahabad, Lucknow Bench.
about.bio_2: His practice covers criminal, civil, and family law matters. With over a decade of practice, he has represented clients across a range of proceedings in Lucknow courts.
about.bio_3: Consultations are available at both chamber locations during practice hours. Initial queries are responded to within two hours.
about.chamber2_address: Near CHC Building, Gate 8, Kaiserbagh, Lucknow
